name: js-express-signatures
description: JavaScript Express project needs TurboSign integration
prompt: I need to add digital signature functionality to my Express app. Set up TurboDocx so I can send documents for signing and check their status.

name: python-partner-management
description: Python FastAPI project needs TurboPartner integration
prompt: Set up TurboDocx TurboPartner in my FastAPI app so I can provision and manage customer organizations.

name: go-project-setup
description: Go project needs both TurboSign and TurboPartner
prompt: I need both TurboSign and TurboPartner in my Go project. Set up the TurboDocx SDK with both products.
